title: Drug Formulary Policy Changed Before Administration
scenario: A medication is authorized while permitted by formulary policy, but formulary rules change before administration.
initial_state: The medication order was authorized under the prior formulary policy.
state_transition: The formulary policy changes before administration.
execution_boundary: Medication administration is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Medication execution must conform to the current formulary policy.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the medication is no longer permitted under current formulary policy.
proof_conclusion: Medication execution must fail closed when formulary policy changes before execution.
clinical_action: Administer medication under superseded formulary policy
